title: Attachment text is an inline preview on getMessage — there is no PAT route to the full text
summary: The poller extracts inbound attachment text (PDF/DOCX/image-OCR/CSV/code via LiteParse) and stores preview + full_text in email_attachments. Over a PAT, the agent only gets the metadata + ~500-char preview INLINE on GET /mail/messages/{id}?include_attachments=true. The YAML output emits retrieve_via: /api/v1/mail/attachments/{id}, but that route is NOT served (grep of app/ finds no such decorator) — it 404s. By design only summary+preview reach the agent (token economy); plan around the preview, and treat the retrieve_via URL as a known dead link to fix in SpiderMail.
references: app/api/v1/mail.py route grep 2026-06-10: NO @router.get('.../attachments/{id}') exists publicly
docs/services/SpiderMail/CLAUDE.md §3 Attachment Processing: preview (first 1500 chars) + full_text (inline <1MB or CDN)
docs/services/SpiderMail/LEARNINGS.md #8: send summary+preview only, agent requests full content when needed
